_comment: 24 key seed coordinates for flood-filling assets/sax-template.jpg. This is the NATIVE 1068x2100 template (verified: all 24 seeds flood-fill CONTAINED, no leak into surrounding canvas). Chosen over the 1472x2894 upscaled version to keep the generated fingering PNG set a reasonable size for offline PWA caching on iPad -- native resolution is already crisp enough for on-screen reference use. These coordinates are used AS-IS, no scaling.
_scaling_note: If you ever replace sax-template.jpg with an image at a different resolution, rescale by (new_width/1068, new_height/2100) and re-run the flood-fill containment check in tools/generate_fingering_pngs.py before trusting the result -- do not reuse these values unscaled against a differently-sized image.
